_comment: Drop this at ~/.nanobot/config.json. Points nanobot at the jmunch gateway on 127.0.0.1:7879 via nanobot's 'custom' OpenAI-compatible provider. The apiKey here is a dummy — nanobot's OpenAI-compat client sends it in the Authorization header, but jmunch strips that and uses its own upstream key (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) when forwarding to Anthropic's OpenAI-compat endpoint. Model name is the Claude model directly (no provider/ prefix — Anthropic's OpenAI-compat endpoint accepts bare Claude model names).
